Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceGeoTransformationDefaults(IGeoTransformationOperationSet) 

virtual void ReplaceGeoTransformationDefaults(IGeoTransformationOperationSet pSource)

Parameters

pSource IGeoTransformationOperationSet

UseShapePreservingProject

Enables/disables shape preserving project. Default is False.

virtual bool UseShapePreservingProject { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

set_UseShapePreservingProjectEx(bool, double, double) 

virtual void set_UseShapePreservingProjectEx(bool vbYesNo, double minSegmentLengthInDegrees, double A_3)

Parameters

vbYesNo bool
minSegmentLengthInDegrees double
A_3 double
Made with docfx
